cards.back: A collection of related data stored on a storage device, such as a hard drive or solid state drive
A set of rules and structures that govern how files are created, stored, and retrieved on a storage device
A category or format that describes the type of data stored in a file, such as text, image, or audio
A unique identifier given to a file, used to identify and locate it on a storage device
Information about a file, such as its permissions, ownership, and timestamp, used to manage access and storage
